youtube_id: TBD — upload pending; video ready at out-spinner-r8c/spinner-wheel-r8c-narrated.mp4

pronunciation_map.Present (verb /prəˈzent/): Use 'Hit Present to go live' — the 'to go live' context cues ElevenLabs to stress the verb form prih-ZENT, not the noun PREZ-ent

youtube_chapters:
0:00 Create and set up a Spinner Wheel slide
0:19 Add entries and preview the spin
0:33 Go live and reveal the winner
notes: AKB-15 r8 — FULL REBUILD with real visual motion throughout. ROOT CAUSE of r7 freeze: r7 padded 12.5s freeze frame after autofill step (steps 5-7 had no visual motion). r8 fix: added sw-spin-wheel step that clicks the spin preview button — wheel actually spins on screen, winner revealed with confetti. Visual beats in trimmed 49.32s video: sw-create ~1s (dashboard tooltip), sw-pick-type ~7s (slide picker), sw-autofill ~11s (autofill tooltip on .form-check.form-check-inline), sw-add-entries ~15s (entries typed into field), sw-save-entries ~21s (Save button tooltip + entries), sw-spin-wheel ~29s (Preview the spin! dialog + spinning wheel), sw-present ~33s (Go live tooltip + spinning wheel + winner at ~45s). VO timings: s01@1.0s, s02@7.0s, s03@11.5s, s04_r8@19.0s, s05@24.0s, s06_r8@29.0s, s07_r8@34.2s. Total audio ends at 41.25s; video tail 8.7s shows actual spin + winner reveal. Outro appended (2.63s branded splash). check_vo_overlap.py PASS. Video: out-spinner-r8c/spinner-wheel-r8c-narrated.mp4 (4.3MB) / .webm with outro also available.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to start. We'll add a Spinner Wheel — AhaSlides' audience-powered live wheel that fills itself when participants scan your QR code.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to start. We will add a Spinner Wheel — powered by audience autofill.

steps.display_text: Select Spinner Wheel from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.
steps.tts_text: Select Spinner Wheel from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.

steps.display_text: Check Participant name autofill in the right panel — participants scan your QR code and enter their name to join, and the wheel fills itself automatically.
steps.tts_text: Tick Participant name autofill in the right panel — scan QR, enter name to join, and the wheel fills itself.

steps.display_text: Or prefer a fixed list? Type entries one per line in the Entries field, or paste a whole list at once.
steps.tts_text: Or prefer a fixed list? Type entries one per line, or paste a whole list at once.

steps.display_text: Click Save — each entry appears as a coloured segment on the wheel.
steps.tts_text: Click Save — each entry appears as a coloured segment on the wheel.

steps.display_text: Click the play button at the centre of the wheel to preview the spin — it lands on a winner!
steps.tts_text: Click the play button at the centre of the wheel to preview the spin — it lands on a winner!

steps.display_text: Hit Present to go live — then press the centre of the wheel to spin for your audience. The winner appears on every screen at once!
steps.tts_text: Hit Present to go live — then press the centre of the wheel to spin for your audience. The winner appears on every screen at once!

mix_command: cd ~/AhaSlides/onboarding-videos && node_modules/ffmpeg-static/ffmpeg -y -i out-spinner-r8c/spinner-wheel-r8c-final.webm -i out-spinner-r8b/s01.mp3 -i out-spinner-r8b/s02.mp3 -i out-spinner-r8b/s03.mp3 -i out-spinner-r8b/s04_r8.mp3 -i out-spinner-r8b/s05.mp3 -i out-spinner-r8b/s06_r8.mp3 -i out-spinner-r8b/s07_r8.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=1000|1000[a1];[2:a]adelay=7000|7000[a2];[3:a]adelay=11500|11500[a3];[4:a]adelay=19000|19000[a4];[5:a]adelay=24000|24000[a5];[6:a]adelay=29000|29000[a6];[7:a]adelay=34200|34200[a7];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7]amix=inputs=7:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k out-spinner-r8c/spinner-wheel-r8c-narrated.webm
